# The Leadership Prologue 2026

> An invitation-first, single-evening leadership summit by The Pediment, held in Bangalore, India on 5 August 2026. It convenes India's most vetted emerging leaders with the institutions that want to meet them, on the eve of their journey to represent India on the international stage.

## Facts
- Event: The Leadership Prologue 2026
- Organiser: The Pediment
- Date: 5 August 2026
- Location: Bangalore, India
- Format: invitation-first, single-evening leadership summit
- Themes: Global Governance, Leadership, Technology, AI, Healthcare (closing note on Climate)
- Attendance: by application and selection only

## Who attends
Selected delegates representing India abroad (VIP Delegates) and a curated group of exceptional national leaders and professionals (Premium Observers).

## How to apply
Apply at https://thepediment.com/apply. Every application is reviewed personally; admission is by selection.

## Pricing
Premium Observer: Inaugural Early Access — ₹5,000 (limited allocation, rate rises once it closes, non-refundable). VIP Delegate onboarding is handled privately after selection.

## Independence
The Leadership Prologue 2026 is an independent summit by The Pediment and is not affiliated with or endorsed by any external conference or organisation.

## Contact
hello@thepediment.com
